hero.headline: Distance Shouldn't Define Your Property's Quality
hero.subheadline: Expert property management in Transylvania for remote owners and global investors

services.heading: End-to-End Property Management
services.subheading: We handle every detail so you don't have to. From finding tenants to fixing leaks — we're your eyes and ears on the ground.
services.card1_desc: Professional listings, photography, and rigorous vetting to find reliable, long-term tenants.
services.card2_desc: Contract drafting, rent collection, and full compliance with Romanian property law.
services.card3_desc: Coordinating everything from minor repairs to full renovations with trusted local contractors.
services.card4_desc: We handle utility bills, taxes, and all local payments on your behalf — on time, every time.

trust.tagline: Fully serviced in English, Romanian, Hungarian & Spanish

why.heading: We Handle the What-ifs and the Late-Night Calls.
why.subheading: Owning property remotely shouldn't be stressful. Our family-run team is always on the ground, always reachable.
why.bullet1_desc: Something breaks at midnight? We're on it. Your tenants always have someone to call.
why.bullet2_desc: Regular inspections, photo reports, and transparent communication. You'll always know the state of your property.
why.bullet3_desc: From the first listing to the final bill — we manage everything so you can focus on life.

footer.tagline: Your eyes and ears on the ground in Târgu Mureș, Transylvania.

prop1.title: 2-Bedroom Apartment with Panoramic Views of Tudor
prop1.desc_heading: 2-Bedroom Apartment with Panoramic Views of Tudor
prop1.desc_p1: This apartment is located on the 3rd floor of a 4-story building, freshly painted inside and equipped with a video intercom system.
prop1.desc_p2: In the kitchen, you will find custom-made furniture, an electric oven, a dishwasher, a hood, a refrigerator with a separate freezer, a sink, an induction hob, and a dining area with an elegant table and 4 comfortable chairs.
prop1.desc_p3: The bedroom features a double bed, two nightstands, and a spacious wardrobe with a hanging rod, shelves, and drawers. The living room, decorated in a minimalist style, includes a wardrobe and a pull-out sofa.
prop1.desc_p4: The balcony is furnished to provide you with a perfect space for relaxation.
prop1.desc_p5: The amenities also include a washer-dryer located in the storage closet. The pantry is equipped with shelves for the most efficient storage possible.
prop1.desc_p6: The entryway has a coat rack and is equipped with shoe storage at the base. In the bedroom and living room, TV cable and internet connections are provided through in-wall installations connected to the router in the hallway.

prop2.title: Chic apartment in the Radio area
prop2.desc_heading: Chic apartment in the Radio area, Târgu Mureș
prop2.desc_p1: The apartment is located in the Radio area, on the 3rd floor of a 4-story building. It is equipped with custom-made kitchen furniture, an electric oven, a dishwasher, a hood, a refrigerator with a separate freezer, a sink, an induction hob, and a central heating unit. Separate from the kitchen, there is a dining area with a table and 4 chairs.
prop2.desc_p2: The living room features minimalist furniture as well as a wardrobe. It is also equipped with an air conditioning system. The living room provides access to the balcony, which overlooks the Radio station area and includes furniture for relaxation.
prop2.desc_p3: The bedroom has a double bed, two nightstands, and a spacious wardrobe with a hanging rod, shelves, and drawers. The living room, decorated in a minimalist style, features a wardrobe and a sofa bed.
prop2.desc_p4: Amenities also include a Whirlpool washing machine, located in a niche near the bathroom. This niche is specially designed for storing cleaning supplies, the ironing board, clothes dryer, vacuum cleaner, and so on.
prop2.desc_p5: The entrance is equipped with an intercom. The hallway has a coat rack and features shoe storage at the base. In the bedroom and living room, TV cable and internet connections are provided through in-wall installations connected to the router in the hallway.

prop3.title: Modern apartment near school and park
prop3.desc_heading: Modern apartment near school and park
prop3.desc_p1: This 2-room apartment is located on Rodniciei Street in Târgu Mureș, very close to a school, park, market, and shops, yet secluded and away from traffic. It is situated on the 2nd floor of a 4-story building, freshly renovated inside.
prop3.desc_p2: In the kitchen, you will find custom-made furniture, an electric oven, a dishwasher, a hood, a refrigerator with a separate freezer, a sink, an induction hob, and a dining area with an elegant table and 4 comfortable chairs.
prop3.desc_p3: The bedroom features a double bed, two nightstands, and a spacious wardrobe with a hanging rod, shelves, and drawers. The living room, decorated in a minimalist style, includes a wardrobe and a pull-out sofa.
prop3.desc_p4: The balcony is accessed from the living room. It is furnished to provide you with a perfect space for relaxation.
prop3.desc_p5: Amenities also include a washer-dryer located in the storage closet. The closet is specially organized for storing cleaning supplies, the ironing board, etc.
prop3.desc_p6: The entrance is equipped with an intercom. The hallway has a coat rack and features shoe storage at the base. In the bedroom and living room, TV cable and internet connections are provided through in-wall installations connected to the router in the hallway.
